name: The Back Nine Golf | Spring, TX
address: 21101 Gosling Rd Bldg B Ste 700, Spring, TX 77388
about: The Back Nine Golf in Spring, TX is a golf simulator venue that offers an indoor golfing experience. The venue provides a convenient option for golfers to practice and play regardless of weather conditions. Located in Spring, it caters to both casual players and those looking to improve their game with simulator technology. The facility is designed to offer a modern golfing environment with amenities that enhance the player experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced golf simulator technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor location weatherproof for all seasons
Versatile amenities suitable for both practice and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service and cocktail menu

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site if you don't have your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be permitted, but the venue offers its own food and bar services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 18 holes take 1-2 hours depending on the simulator setup and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility welcomes families, though specific amenities for children may vary.
